task.maidspell.spell_combat_melee.desc: Maid uses equipped spell books for spell attacks. Supports spell books in offhand, mainhand or backpack.
task.maidspell.spell_combat_far.desc: Maid uses equipped spell books for spell attacks. Supports spell books in offhand, mainhand or backpack.
task.maidspell.spell_combat_far.conditio: Requires equipped spell book (offhand, mainhand or backpack)
task.maidspell.spell_combat_melee.condit: Requires equipped spell book (offhand, mainhand or backpack)
item.maidspell.spell_enhancement_core.de: Copies the master's Iron's Spellbooks attributes that are above their default values
Refreshes every 2 seconds and only works when Iron's Spellbooks is installed
item.maidspell.bleeding_heart.desc2: Converts %s%% of damage dealt to enemies into health
item.maidspell.bleeding_heart.desc3: Heals both the maid and master
item.maidspell.flow_core.desc2: Heals once every %ss for (%s%% * favorability level * max health)
item.maidspell.flow_core.desc3: Reduces final damage taken by (%s%% * favorability level)
itemGroup.touhou_little_maid_spell: Touhou Little Maid: Master of All Spells
item.maidspell.quick_chant_ring.desc2: Reduces spell cooldown by %s%% per maid favorability level
item.maidspell.spring_ring.desc2: Increases damage by same percentage as maid's lost health percentage
item.maidspell.double_heart_chain.desc2: Maid and master share damage taken
item.maidspell.rock_crystal.desc1: A magical crystal solid as bedrock
item.maidspell.sliver_cercis.desc2: After the maid is hurt %s times, or if more than %s ticks passed since the last trigger, deals true damage equal to %s%% of that hit to the most recent attacker
item.maidspell.blue_note.desc1: Right-click to open the spell collection interface
item.maidspell.blue_note.desc2: Used to mark spells from Iron's Spells
item.maidspell.blue_note.desc3: Marked spells will be cast on the master
item.maidspell.hairpin.desc1: Two families united in marriage, bound by vows
item.maidspell.hairpin.desc2: Maid's damage is reduced by master's defense calculations before being applied
item.maidspell.hairpin.desc4: Favorability Level 3: Immune to negative effects
item.maidspell.hairpin.desc5: Maid gains +%s favorability when eating food
item.maidspell.fragrant_ingenuity.desc1: A carefully woven satchel, carrying a sweet fragrance
item.maidspell.fragrant_ingenuity.desc2: Maid gains +%s favorability when eating food
item.maidspell.fragrant_ingenuity.desc3: When the maid feeds the master, grants 1 random beneficial effect for %ss
item.maidspell.fragrant_ingenuity.desc4: With Dreamcloud Crystal, this becomes 2 different effects at level 2-10 for 120-240 seconds
item.maidspell.chaos_book.desc2: Converts the original hit into %s separate damage instances, each dealing at least %s damage, and resets the target's invulnerability frames
item.maidspell.chaos_book.desc3: Each hit also deals extra true damage equal to %s%% of the target's max health (minimum %s)
item.maidspell.soul_book.desc2: Maid cannot take damage exceeding %s%% of maximum health
item.maidspell.soul_book.desc3: If the next hit arrives within %ss of the previous one, that damage is canceled entirely
item.maidspell.ender_pocket.desc1: A mysterious pouch connecting to ender space
item.maidspell.ender_pocket.desc2: Allows remote access to maid backpacks
item.maidspell.ender_pocket.desc3: Press bind key to open maid selection interface
key.categories.touhou_little_maid_spell: Touhou Little Maid: Master of All Spells
gui.maidspell.ender_pocket.title: Ender Pocket
gui.maidspell.ender_pocket.button.descri: Click to open maid selection panel
gui.maidspell.ender_pocket.maid.name: Maid: %s
item.maidspell.wound_rime_blade.desc2: Records the lowest health of struck enemies and prevents later healing from exceeding that value
item.maidspell.wound_rime_blade.desc3: The wounds it creates never heal
item.maidspell.wound_rime_blade.desc4: Only works on non-player, non-maid targets; repeated hits stack the suppression record
item.maidspell.anchor_core.desc2: Continuously force-loads the chunk the maid is in
item.maidspell.anchor_core.desc3: Intercepts abnormal save / saveWithoutId / remove calls that could duplicate or delete the maid
item.maidspell.anchor_core.desc4: Blocks entity conversion and some external capture mechanics; prevents loot drops while the maid still has health
item.maidspell.anchor_core.desc5: Anchored to this world, never to fade
item.maidspell.spell_overlimit_core.desc: Allows spell books that would normally be mutually exclusive because of same-type or inheritance checks to coexist
Without it, only one book from the same type hierarchy can be kept; equipping it removes that restriction
item.touhou_little_maid_spell.wind_seeki: Bell guides your path, breeze brings blessings
The nearest Hidden Retreat is at [%s, %s, %s] (%s blocks away)
Click to add teleport command to chat
Teleportation failed, unable to create The Retreat
First time entering The Retreat, your exclusive Hidden Retreat has been assigned

Ring the bell to call cherry blossoms
Gentle wind comes through the silent deep forest
Old friend waits with flowers
No Hidden Retreat nearby, added to waiting queue...
You can only seek it once!
item.touhou_little_maid_spell.owner_clea: Right-click on maid to clear owner
Only usable by creative mode players and operators
You don't have permission to use this tool
item.touhou_little_maid_spell.maid_tamed: Your craftsmanship is as fine as ever
item.maidspell.sliver_cercis.desc4: With Dreamcloud Crystal, this triggers on every hit taken and the retaliation multiplier is doubled
item.maidspell.soul_book.desc4: Also intercepts abnormal damage-resolution paths for both players and maids
item.maidspell.melee_task_icon.desc: Icon for melee spell combat task
item.maidspell.far_task_icon.desc: Icon for ranged spell combat task
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.s: Spell blacklist, maids will not cast these spells
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.a:
Whether to automatically ally maids with players (default: true)
true: Maids and players join the same team with friendly fire disabled
false: No automatic alliance
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.f: Fragrant Ingenuity favorability gain when eating (default: 2)
Fragrant Ingenuity buff duration when maid feeds owner (in ticks)
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.m: Maid cooldown multiplier(default:1.0,only effective on spellCombatTask)
Maid damage multiplier(default:1.0,only effective on spellCombatTask)
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.q: Quick Chant Ring cooldown reduction ratio
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.s: Spring Ring maximum damage bonus ratio
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.h: Hairpin minimum extension ticks for beneficial effects
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.s: Silver Cercis cooldown ticks after trigger
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.d: Double Heart Chain damage share ratio
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.s: Silver Cercis required attack count to trigger
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.f: Flow Core effect trigger interval in ticks
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.c: Chaos Book true damage percentage of max health
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.s: Soul Book damage threshold percentage of max health
Soul Book damage interval threshold in ticks
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.c: Chaos Book minimum damage per split
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.m: Melee spell task attack interval (in ticks, default: 8)
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.f: Far spell task attack interval (in ticks, default: 5)
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.e:
Whether to enable private dimension mode (default: true)
true: Each player has their own retreat dimension
false: All players share one retreat dimension, each with one structure

Whether to enable quota limit in shared mode (default: true)
true: Each player can only search for one hidden retreat in the shared dimension
false: No search limit in shared mode, players can find unlimited structures
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.d:
Whether to disable hostile mob spawning in retreat dimensions (default: false)
true: No hostile mobs will naturally spawn in retreat dimensions
false: Hostile mobs spawn normally in retreat dimensions
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.a:
Whether to allow all structures in retreat dimensions (default: false)
true: Allow all structures, ignore whitelist
false: Only allow whitelisted structures
Whitelist of structures allowed in retreat dimensions (effective when allowAllStructures is false)
command.maidspell.retreat.reset.no_recor: This player has no retreat dimension record
command.maidspell.retreat.reset.success: Reset Hidden Retreat quota for player %s
item.touhou_little_maid_spell.dream_cat_: Dreams amid the clouds, where all arts return to one.
Roaming the starry sea, with all things shaped by will.
A sigh in seclusion, as the journey's end draws near.
Creation's afterglow, all born of benevolence.
Removes spell cooldowns, grants +1 to every Curios slot type, and doubles all Iron's Spellbooks attributes on the maid when that mod is present
Max health +50%, final damage taken x0.7, each final hit capped at 40 damage; immune to fire, drowning, explosions, vanilla magic, and lava
Overworld: Saturation II / Resistance II / Regeneration II; Nether: Strength III / Speed III / Haste III; End: Night Vision IV / Resistance IV / Strength IV; continuously invulnerable in The Retreat
Every 30 seconds grants 2 different random beneficial effects at level 2-10 for 30-60 seconds, and blocks all harmful effects from being applied
Each hit adds equal bonus true damage; only Mob targets are frozen for 1 second; enemies within 5 blocks take 10% true-damage splash, excluding players and maids
Boosts other maids within 20 blocks with +50% attack damage and 1/3 spell cooldown, and repairs 1 durability per second on all items in the maid's inventory

On death, revives to full health with a chance of 100% minus 10% per revive in the last 120 seconds, then gains 15 seconds of invulnerability; creatures stay friendly and bosses only retaliate after being attacked by her

Synergies: Silver Cercis retaliates every hit and doubles in power; Chaos Book true damage doubles; Double Heart Chain becomes maid-only 50% damage; Fragrant Ingenuity feeding upgrades to 2 different high-level beneficial effects
advancements.touhou_little_maid_spell.dr: All the way through, you've worked hard, Master.
touhou_little_maid_spell.configuration.d: Dream Crystal random beneficial effect blacklist
